steps.expected: Returns sleep analysis template with messages
steps.observed: Response contains messages array with role 'user' and text about analyzing sleep data for last 7 days including sleep_score, sleep_duration, deep_sleep, rem_sleep, sleep_latency

evidence.network: JSON-RPC prompts/get -> result.messages[0].role='user', content.text contains sleep analysis instructions

steps.action: Send prompts/get with name compare_metrics, arguments {metrics: 'hrv,sleep_score', period: 'last_30_days'}
steps.observed: Response contains messages array with role 'user' and text about comparing hrv,sleep_score data over last 30 days, looking for correlations

evidence.network: JSON-RPC prompts/get -> result.messages[0].role='user', content.text contains metric comparison instructions with 'hrv,sleep_score' and 'last 30 days'

steps.action: Send tools/call for get_health_data with invalid params (empty metrics array, missing start_date/end_date)
steps.expected: Response has isError: true with error description
steps.observed: Response has isError:true, content text says 'MCP error -32602: Input validation error' with details about metrics array too small and missing start_date/end_date

evidence.network: JSON-RPC tools/call -> result.isError=true, result.content[0].text='MCP error -32602: Input validation error: Invalid arguments for tool get_health_data: [...]'

steps.action: Spawn MCP server WITHOUT TOTUS_API_KEY env var
steps.expected: Server starts but tool calls return auth error
steps.observed: Server initialized successfully, but tools/call returned isError:true with message 'No API key configured' and setup instructions

evidence.network: JSON-RPC initialize -> success; tools/call -> result.isError=true, content text='No API key configured. To use the Totus MCP server: 1. Create an API key... 2. Set TOTUS_API_KEY...'

steps.action: Spawn MCP server with read-only API key (health:read, connections:read, audit:read, keys:read)
Send tools/call for create_share (requires shares:write) with valid params
steps.expected: isError: true with message specifying missing scope
steps.observed: Response has isError:true, content text says 'Insufficient permissions. Your API key needs the "shares:write" scope for this action.'

evidence.network: JSON-RPC tools/call -> result.isError=true, content text='Insufficient permissions. Your API key needs the "shares:write" scope for this action. Create a new API key with the required scopes at https://totus.com/dashboard/settings'

assertions.title: No API key returns setup instructions

steps.action: Spawn MCP server without TOTUS_API_KEY, send tools/call for get_health_data
steps.expected: isError: true with instructions to set env var or run totus auth login
steps.observed: Response has isError:true, content includes instructions: '1. Create an API key at https://totus.com/dashboard/settings' and '2. Set the TOTUS_API_KEY environment variable' and 'Or run totus auth login'

evidence.network: JSON-RPC tools/call -> result.isError=true, content text contains setup instructions including TOTUS_API_KEY env var and 'totus auth login'

summary: Tested 11 assertions: 11 passed, 0 failed. All MCP resources (metrics, profile, shares), prompts (analyze_sleep, compare_metrics, prepare_share, health_summary), error handling (isError flag), and auth scenarios (no key, insufficient scope) work correctly.
